summary: Classified the 10 live inventory PRs independently. No shared canonical was selected, no close/merge/fix action is safe or allowed, and #83295 plus #83458 are routed to central security handling only for those exact PRs.

actions.reason: Keep open as an independent focused PR; close, merge, fix, and raise-pr actions are not allowed and proof is still missing.
Keep open for normal maintainer/author follow-up; the PR is focused and potentially useful, but finalization is out of scope and blocked by maintainer rebase/proof requirements.
Keep open as an independent gateway streaming fix candidate; proof failure blocks any fixed-by or merge-style conclusion.
Keep open for maintainer/product review; the PR is focused but uneditable by maintainers and lacks required real UI proof.
Keep open as a useful independent Telegram fix candidate; branch update and maintainer review are required and automation may not fix or merge it.
Route only #83295 to central OpenClaw security handling; continue non-security classifications for unrelated PRs.
Route only #83458 to central OpenClaw security handling; do not close, merge, comment, label, or plan a fix for this PR in ProjectClownfish.
Keep open as an independent sessions JSON fix candidate; unstable checks and public JSON compatibility judgment block any stronger action.
Keep open as an independent doctor CLI fix candidate; branch update and proof follow-up are needed and automation may not merge or fix.
Keep open as an independent Codex auth bridge fix candidate; it requires technical correctness and compatibility judgment plus real behavior proof.
